steps.name: project-setup
steps.summary: npm workspaces monorepo: frontend/ (Vite+React+TS+Tailwind, eslint flat config, vitest dummy), backend/ (Express+TS, src/app.ts+index.ts with GET /api/health, tsx dev, vitest+supertest, migrate stub), ocr-service/ (FastAPI app/main.py GET /health, app/__init__.py, tests/test_smoke.py, requirements.txt incl pypdf/pypdfium2/reportlab/httpx). Root package.json scripts: lint/build/test (test runs workspace tests + `python3 -m pytest` in ocr-service). .gitignore extended (dist, .env*, storage/, __pycache__). .env.example with DATABASE_URL/BACKEND_PORT/OCR_SERVICE_URL/OCR_PORT/CORS_ORIGIN/STORAGE_DIR/TEMPLATE_PATH/CODEX_AUTH_JSON. assets/malso_application_template.pdf (copied+renamed from root PDF; 12 AcroForm fields verified incl trailing-space 'vehicle_year '), assets/samples/*.jpg. storage/.gitkeep. docs/ filled from master plan: PRD.md (§1), ARCHITECTURE.md (§2.1-2.8), ADR.md (ADR-001..010 + philosophy + 'confirmed codex CLI interface' note), UI_GUIDE.md (§4.1-4.7). Deploy skeleton (TODO-only): Dockerfile.frontend/backend/ocr, docker-compose.yml, render.yaml, README.md. codex CLI: INSTALLED (codex-cli 0.128.0); supports image input `-i/--image`, `-s/--sandbox read-only`, `--skip-git-repo-check`, `--output-last-message <FILE>`, `--json`, `--output-schema <FILE>` — step2 can proceed (image input supported). NOTE: machine has `python3` not `python`; root test script and README use `python3`.

steps.name: db-schema
steps.summary: PostgreSQL schema + pool + idempotent migration (pg, no ORM). backend/src/db/schema.sql: pgcrypto ext, vehicles + documents tables (columns/types exactly per ARCHITECTURE.md §2.4), indexes vehicles_reg_no_norm_idx / vehicles_vin_norm_idx (lower(replace(coalesce(...),' ','')) for partial search), vehicles_updated_at_idx (desc), documents_vehicle_id_idx, partial unique vehicles_vin_uniq (where vin is not null and vin<>''); no updated_at trigger (app sets updated_at=now()). backend/src/db/pool.ts: `pool` (pg.Pool from DATABASE_URL — no module-load crash if unset), `waitForDb(maxAttempts=10)` exponential backoff, `query<T>(sql, params?): Promise<pg.QueryResult<T>>`. backend/src/db/migrate.ts: `runMigrations(): Promise<void>` — waitForDb then runs schema.sql in one txn (idempotent, throws on failure); schema.sql resolved via import.meta.url. backend/src/db/migrate-cli.ts is `npm -w backend run migrate` target (build copies schema.sql to dist/db/). backend/src/index.ts now awaits runMigrations() before listen (exits 1 on failure). GET /api/health now returns {status:'ok', db:'ok'|'down'} via `select 1` ping (step3 adds ocr field). backend/test/migrate.test.ts (skips if no DATABASE_URL): runMigrations twice = no error, to_regclass('vehicles'/'documents') non-null, all 5 indexes present; health.test.ts updated for new shape. Deps added: pg, @types/pg. Verified against local postgres 16: migrate x2 idempotent, tables/indexes/columns correct, all tests pass; npm run build && npm run lint clean.

steps.name: ocr-service
steps.summary: ocr-service (FastAPI, stateless) — 3 endpoints. app/schema.py: ExtractedFields (10 Optional fields: owner_name/owner_ssn/owner_address/vehicle_reg_no/vehicle_vin/vehicle_model/vehicle_year str|None, vehicle_mileage/vehicle_weight/vehicle_total_weight int|None), ExtractResponse{fields, raw, status:Literal['ok','partial','failed'], warnings:list[str], error_code:str|None}, FillPdfRequest (same logical fields all str|None + current_date). app/codex_client.py: run_codex_ocr(image_path) runs `codex exec --skip-git-repo-check -s read-only --color never -i -o ` via subprocess.run(timeout=90, cwd=tmpdir), reads -o last-message file (falls back to stdout); typed exceptions CodexUnavailable/CodexAuth/CodexRateLimit/CodexTimeout/CodexBadOutput distinguished by exit code + auth/rate substring patterns in stdout+stderr; codex_health()->'ok'|'missing'|'unauthenticated'|'unknown' via `codex --version` + ~/.codex/auth.json existence (no OCR call). app/extract.py: extract_from_upload(data,filename)->ExtractResponse, NEVER raises, NEVER fakes. Flow: magic-byte/Pillow open (PDF -> pypdfium2 render page 0 only @scale 2.0) -> downscale long side to 2000px -> save temp JPEG q90 -> run_codex_ocr -> defensive JSON parse (first '{'..last '}', then ```json fence) -> normalize (vin re.sub [^A-Z0-9] uppercase + 17-char warning, mileage/weight/total_weight strip non-digits->int else None+warning, address \s+->space, reg_no \s+->space, year extract (19|20)\d{2} else raw); status ok if all 10 set, partial if some empty/missing, failed if image bad / codex error / non-JSON. error_code map: bad image->OCR_BAD_IMAGE, CodexUnavailable->OCR_UNAVAILABLE, CodexAuth->OCR_AUTH, CodexRateLimit->OCR_RATE_LIMIT, CodexTimeout->OCR_TIMEOUT, CodexBadOutput/non-JSON->OCR_BAD_OUTPUT. Module-level threading.Semaphore(2) for concurrency. app/fill_pdf.py: PDF_FIELD_NAMES=['owner_name','owner_ssn','owner_address','vehicle_reg_no','vehicle_vin_1','vehicle_vin_2','vehicle_model','vehicle_year ' (TRAILING SPACE),'vehicle_mileage','vehicle_weight_1','vehicle_weight_2','current_date']; asserted == template get_fields() on first use; template path = TEMPLATE_PATH env or assets/malso_application_template.pdf (PdfTemplateMissing if absent). fill(req)->(bytes, missing_important:list[str]) where important=['owner_name','vehicle_reg_no','vehicle_vin_1']; logical->PDF mapping: vehicle_vin -> vin_1 & vin_2 (same), vehicle_weight->weight_1, vehicle_total_weight->weight_2 (falls back to weight_1), vehicle_year->'vehicle_year ', current_date defaults to f'{y}년 {m}월 {d}일'; None/empty -> ''; pypdf PdfWriter clone -> update_page_form_field_values per page (auto_regenerate=False) -> set_need_appearances_writer(True) -> bytes. NO reportlab overlay fallback needed (pypdf path passes tests). app/main.py: GET /health -> {status:'ok', codex:codex_health()}; startup hook writes CODEX_AUTH_JSON env -> ~/.codex/auth.json (chmod 600) if set; POST /extract (UploadFile) -> 400 if missing/empty, 429 {error.code:OCR_BUSY} if semaphore full, else 200 ExtractResponse (runs extract in asyncio.to_thread); POST /fill-pdf (FillPdfRequest JSON) -> Response(application/pdf, header X-Missing-Fields) or 500 {error:{code:PDF_TEMPLATE_MISSING|PDF_FILL_FAILED}}. tests/test_ocr.py: 15 tests (fill all fields / field-names-match / defaults+missing / parse pure-json|codefence|prose+json|garbage / normalize + bad-number-warns / extract bad-image|empty / codex mocked partial + all-5-error-codes / health) — all pass. codex CLI present (0.128.0) AND authenticated: real OCR run against assets/samples/자동차등록증_레이.jpg returned status='partial' with correctly extracted owner/vin/model/year/mileage/total_weight (only vehicle_weight blank). `npm run build` clean (backend/frontend unaffected).

steps.name: backend-api
steps.summary: Node/Express/TS backend API (frontend talks only to /api; ocr-service is reached only via services/ocr). app.ts: manual CORS (CORS_ORIGIN env only; exposes X-Missing-Fields), express.json({limit:'1mb'}), GET /api/health -> {status:'ok', db:'ok'|'down' via select 1, ocr:'ok'|'down' via ocr.health()}, mounts malsoRouter@/api/malso + filesRouter@/api/files, then central errorHandler ({error:{code,message}}, no stack; multer LIMIT_FILE_SIZE->413 else 400). index.ts unchanged (migrate+listen). services/storage.ts: STORAGE_DIR = env STORAGE_DIR or <repoRoot>/storage (repoRoot via import.meta.url ../../..); creates uploads/ & generated/ at load; save(buf,ext)->'uploads/<uuid>.<ext>', saveGenerated(buf,ext='pdf')->'generated/<uuid>.pdf', openRead(relPath)->{stream,absPath} asserts resolved path starts with STORAGE_DIR (traversal guard) + existsSync, mimeOf(relPath) by ext. services/ocr.ts: OCR_SERVICE_URL env (default http://localhost:8000); OcrFields (10 logical fields), ExtractResult{fields,raw,status,warnings,errorCode}; emptyFields(), failedResult(msg?,code?); extract(buf,filename) -> POST {OCR_URL}/extract multipart (global fetch+FormData+Blob, AbortSignal.timeout 95s), NEVER throws — non-2xx/network/timeout -> failedResult() ({status:'failed',fields:empty,warnings:['ocr-service 응답 없음'],errorCode:'OCR_UNAVAILABLE'}); maps snake error_code->errorCode; fillPdf(values:FillPdfValues incl current_date, all str|null) -> POST /fill-pdf JSON, returns {pdf:Buffer, missing:string[] from X-Missing-Fields header}, throws on non-2xx (route -> 502); health()->'ok'|'down' (GET /health, 3s timeout). services/vehicles.ts (pool.query, no ORM): Vehicle/VehicleSummary(no owner_ssn)/DocumentRow types; createFromOcr(extract:ExtractResult)->Vehicle (if non-empty vehicle_vin: SELECT by vin first, return existing; else INSERT status='draft', ocr_status=status, raw_ocr jsonb={raw,status,warnings,errorCode}, app_date=today 'YYYY년 M월 D일'; on 23505 -> SELECT by vin); getById(id)->{vehicle,documents[]}|null; update(id,fields)->Vehicle|null (only ALLOWED_VEHICLE_FIELDS: reg_no,vin,owner_name,owner_ssn,owner_address,model,year,mileage,weight,total_weight,app_date,note; mileage/weight/total_weight coerced to int|null, '' -> null; updated_at=now()); setCompleted(id) (status='completed'); addDocument({vehicle_id,kind,file_path,orig_name,mime,size_bytes})->DocumentRow; getDocumentById(id)->DocumentRow|null; search(q,limit)->VehicleSummary[] — q empty: 'select <cols> from vehicles order by updated_at desc limit $1'; else q.replace(/\s/g,'').toLowerCase(), escape \,%,_ , parameterized 'where lower(replace(coalesce(reg_no,\'\'),\' \',\'\')) like $1 escape \'\\\' or lower(replace(coalesce(vin,...))) like $1 escape \'\\\' order by updated_at desc limit $2'; limit clamped 1..200 (default 50). lib/upload.ts: ALLOWED_UPLOAD_MIME={image/jpeg,image/png,image/webp,application/pdf}, detectUploadMime(buf) by magic bytes (FFD8FF / PNG sig / RIFF..WEBP / %PDF-), extForMime. lib/validation.ts: isUuid (regex), ALLOWED_VEHICLE_FIELDS, validateVehicleFields (numeric finite & 0..1e8, text len<=2000, unknown keys ignored). lib/dates.ts: todayKr 'YYYY년 M월 D일', todayCompact 'YYYYMMDD'. Routes — routes/malso.ts (multer memoryStorage, fileSize 20MB): POST /api/malso (single 'file') -> 400 NO_FILE/BAD_TYPE(mimetype not allowed)/BAD_CONTENT(magic-byte fail); else storage.save -> ocr.extract (try/catch -> failedResult, never blocks) -> vehicles.createFromOcr -> addDocument(kind='registration_cert',orig_name,mime=detected,size) -> 201 {vehicle, fields, ocrStatus, warnings, errorCode}; GET /api/malso/search?q=&limit= (q>64 -> 400 BAD_QUERY; limit non-numeric/<1 -> 400 BAD_LIMIT) -> VehicleSummary[]; GET /api/malso/:id (non-uuid or missing -> 404) -> {vehicle, documents:[{id,kind,orig_name,mime,created_at,url:'/api/files/'+id}]}; PATCH /api/malso/:id (body {fields:{}}; non-object -> 400 BAD_BODY; validateVehicleFields fail -> 400 BAD_FIELDS; not found -> 404) -> {vehicle}; POST /api/malso/:id/pdf (optional body {fields} -> validate+update first) -> map vehicle row to FillPdfRequest (vehicle_vin=vin, vehicle_weight=weight, vehicle_total_weight=total_weight, current_date=app_date, mileage/weight/total_weight stringified, rest 1:1) -> ocr.fillPdf (fail -> 502 OCR_FILL_FAILED) -> storage.saveGenerated (fail -> 500 STORAGE_FULL) -> addDocument(kind='malso_application',mime='application/pdf') -> setCompleted -> 200 application/pdf, Content-Disposition attachment filename*=UTF-8''말소등록신청서_<reg_no||vin, ws stripped>_<YYYYMMDD>.pdf, X-Missing-Fields header (always set, comma-joined). routes/files.ts: GET /api/files/:docId (non-uuid -> 400 BAD_ID) -> getDocumentById (missing -> 404 NOT_FOUND) -> storage.openRead (file gone -> 404 FILE_MISSING + structured log) -> stream piped, Content-Type=stored mime, Content-Disposition: inline. Frontend API base = /api. Deps added: multer ^2.1.1, @types/multer (dev). Tests: backend/test/api.test.ts (13 supertest tests, skips if no DATABASE_URL; ocr.ts mocked via vi.mock keeping emptyFields/failedResult real; STORAGE_DIR -> /tmp via vi.hoisted): health shape, upload->201+doc, bad mimetype 400, magic-byte fail 400, 25MB ->400/413, ocr.extract throws -> still 201 ocrStatus='failed', PATCH updates + bad numeric 400 + missing id 404, POST /pdf -> application/pdf + X-Missing-Fields + completed + malso_application doc + field applied, fillPdf fail -> 502, GET /api/files/:docId 200 + content-type, bad uuid 400, unknown 404, search by reg_no/vin part, '%_%' literal (no match, no crash), empty q -> recent, no owner_ssn in any search row, q>64 -> 400. Verified against local postgres 16 (brew postgresql@16): migrate + `npm -w backend test` all 13 pass; `npm run build && npm run lint` clean (frontend+backend).

steps.name: frontend
steps.summary: React+TS+Tailwind+react-router-dom v7 + @tanstack/react-query v5 SPA implementing docs/UI_GUIDE.md §4.1-4.7. vite.config: dev proxy /api -> BACKEND_URL||:4000. main.tsx: QueryClientProvider(retry 1, no refetchOnWindowFocus) > BrowserRouter > ToastProvider > App. Routes (App.tsx): SidebarLayout(Outlet) wraps / -> redirect /malso/new; /malso/new & /malso/:id -> MalsoInputPage; /malso/search -> MalsoSearchPage; * -> /malso/new. api/types.ts: backend contract types (Vehicle, VehicleSummary, DocumentItem, OcrFields, UploadResponse, VehicleDetail, VehicleField union, OCR_TO_VEHICLE map). api/client.ts: fetch wrappers (apiGet/apiPatch/apiPostForm/apiPostPdf) normalizing {error:{code,message}} -> ApiError; apiPostPdf returns {blob, missing[] from X-Missing-Fields}. api/hooks.ts: useUploadMalso (POST /api/malso multipart), useVehicle(id) (GET /api/malso/:id), usePatchVehicle(id) (PATCH, updates cache), useGeneratePdf(id) (POST /api/malso/:id/pdf, invalidates), useSearch(q) (GET /api/malso/search?q=, keepPreviousData -> stale-safe). lib/merge.ts: mergeOcrFields(current, ocr, {touched, overwrite}) — fills only empty+untouched fields (overwrite mode replaces all); missingOcrLabels(ocr); FormValues type. lib/format.ts: stripCommas, maskSsn (6digits-*******), formatDate 'YYYY. M. D.', formatDateTime, formatClock, todayKr 'YYYY년 M월 D일', splitHighlight. lib/useDebounce.ts: useDebounce(value,ms) + useDebouncedCallback(fn,ms){call,flush,cancel}. components: SidebarLayout (220px sidebar 'Totaload' + 말소 입력/말소 검색 NavLink), Dropzone (drag&drop+click, accept image/*+pdf, client-side type/size<=20MB check w/ HEIC hint), ImageViewer (img: wheel/button zoom, drag pan, 90° rotate, reset, original download, thumbnails; PDF: iframe + '원본 PDF 보기'), Toast/ToastProvider/useToast (bottom-right, ~3s/6s err, closable, error action button), ConfirmModal (Esc closes), PdfPreviewModal (<object> blob preview + download/print['실제 크기(100%)'] + '닫고 계속 수정'/'새 말소 입력 시작' + download-link fallback if can't embed), misc.tsx (EmptyState/Skeleton/StatusBadge[작성중 neutral|완료 green]/Spinner), VehicleForm (THE shared 검수 폼 — sections 소유자/차량/신청서, Tab order = cert reading order; per-field amber left-border+'확인 필요' when important&empty [owner_name/reg_no/vin], '자동 입력'/'수정됨' chip when OCR-filled, light format hints, SSN masked by default + 👁 toggle [readonly while masked]; banner: blue 분석중+분석취소 / green ok+close / amber partial+missing labels / amber failed+다시분석; internal values/touched/dirty refs, debounced PATCH autosave [0.8s, blur flush, one in-flight, re-queue on fail], '저장 중…/저장됨 HH:MM' + '저장 실패—다시 저장'; vehicleId undefined disables autosave [state B]; on vehicleId first-appear persists touched fields; applyOcr={fields,mode,token} effect merges once per token; PDF button -> onMissingImportant confirm -> onGeneratePdf(values)). pages/MalsoInputPage.tsx: handles state A/B/C with one component. State A (/malso/new, no localFile): centered Dropzone + '작성 중' list (useSearch('') filtered status==='draft', top 10) -> click -> /malso/:id. File dropped -> set local objectURL preview + useUploadMalso.mutate -> render 2-col immediately (left ImageViewer[localFile], right VehicleForm analyzing=true vehicleId=undefined); on success: justUploadedId ref, set ocrResult + applyOcr(fill-empty token++), navigate(/malso/:id, replace) — formKey state stays stable across this self-transition (effect on routeId only bumps formKey + clears localFile/ocr when it's NOT our own upload, e.g. sidebar nav / different vehicle); on error: error toast w/ 재시도. '분석 취소' -> analyzeCancelled (ref-tracked) -> ignore OCR result, manual mode. State C (/malso/:id): useVehicle -> skeleton while loading, then top summary (reg_no·model·StatusBadge·생성/수정 시각 + '← 검색으로'), 2-col ImageViewer[registration_cert docs, falls back to localFile]+VehicleForm(initialVehicle=vehicle), '생성된 말소등록 신청서' doc list (미리보기/다운로드), hidden re-upload <input> for '다시 분석'(ask overwrite-vs-fill-empty confirm then pick file -> re-POST /api/malso -> applyOcr w/ chosen mode) & '이미지 추가 첨부'(re-POST, no apply, refetch). PDF: generatePdf.mutateAsync(values) -> PdfPreviewModal(blob, filename '말소등록신청서_<reg_no||vin ws-stripped>_<YYYYMMDD>.pdf'), toast missing fields. beforeunload guard while save failing. ConfirmModal promise-wrapped via ask(). pages/MalsoSearchPage.tsx: big search input (돋보기 left, ✕ right), debounce 300ms (useDebounce on trimmed q), useSearch -> rows; empty q -> '최근 차량'; >50 -> '범위를 좁히세요' note; rows: reg_no(splitHighlight <mark>)·model·owner_name·StatusBadge·formatDate(created_at), click/Enter -> /malso/:id; 0건 -> '‘q’에 해당하는 차량이 없습니다' + '말소 입력에서 새로 추가' link; isFetching -> opacity-60 on prev results (no flicker); NO owner_ssn shown. Visual: neutral + amber(empty/확인필요·partial/failed) + green(완료/성공) + red(error/toast); cards rounded-lg/md (not all 2xl), inputs bg-neutral-900, primary btn bg-white text-black; fade-in/toast-in only; inline SVG icons strokeWidth 1.5, no boxes; NO backdrop-blur/gradient-text/purple/glow/blur-orb. Tests (no jsdom dep): src/test/merge.test.ts (6 — fill-empty, never-overwrite-touched, never-overwrite-nonempty, ignore-empty-ocr, overwrite mode, missingOcrLabels) + src/test/format.test.ts (5 — maskSsn, stripCommas, splitHighlight); replaced placeholder App.test.ts. Deps added: react-router-dom ^7, @tanstack/react-query ^5. dev server: vite on :5173 (proxies /api -> :4000). VERIFIED: npm -w frontend run build/lint/test all clean; root npm run build && lint && test all pass (backend api.test skipped — no DATABASE_URL in CI path; ocr 15 pytest pass). Manual API smoke through vite proxy with local postgres+backend+ocr-service running: GET /api/health {ok,db:ok,ocr:ok}; POST /api/malso w/ sample cert -> 201 + real OCR fields; GET/PATCH/search/POST-pdf (2-page PDF, X-Missing-Fields header) all work. Browser-click UX checklist (README '수동 UX 체크리스트') NOT auto-run (no browser in env) — added to README for manual verification.

steps.name: deploy
steps.summary: Deploy config (no app code touched). Dockerfile.frontend: node:20-slim build (`npm ci` + `npm -w frontend run build`) -> nginx:1.27-alpine serving frontend/dist; deploy/nginx.conf.template (envsubst'd by the nginx image: `listen ${PORT}`, `location /api/ { proxy_pass ${BACKEND_URL}; ... proxy_read_timeout 120s }` no trailing slash so /api prefix kept, `location / { try_files ... /index.html }` SPA fallback); ENV PORT=80 BACKEND_URL=http://backend:4000. Dockerfile.backend: 2-stage node:20-slim — build runs `npm ci`+`npm -w backend run build` (tsc + copies schema.sql to dist/db/), runtime does `npm ci --omit=dev` + copies backend/dist, ENV STORAGE_DIR=/data/storage PORT=4000, CMD node backend/dist/index.js (migrate-on-boot already in index.ts). Dockerfile.ocr: python:3.12-slim -> install Node 20 via NodeSource + `npm install -g @openai/codex` (verified: package exists, v0.130.0; build fails if codex install fails) + `pip install -r ocr-service/requirements.txt`, COPY ocr-service/ + assets/, ENV TEMPLATE_PATH=/app/assets/malso_application_template.pdf PORT=8000, ENTRYPOINT deploy/ocr-entrypoint.sh (writes $CODEX_AUTH_JSON -> ~/.codex/auth.json chmod 600 if set, then `exec uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${PORT:-8000}`). render.yaml (Blueprint, parses w/ yaml.safe_load): 3 web services runtime:docker — totaload-ocr (plan free, healthCheckPath /health, envVars PORT=8000, TEMPLATE_PATH, CODEX_AUTH_JSON sync:false), totaload-backend (plan starter [free can't mount disk], healthCheckPath /api/health, disk{name:storage,mountPath:/data/storage,sizeGB:1}, envVars PORT=4000, STORAGE_DIR=/data/storage, DATABASE_URL fromDatabase totaload-db connectionString, OCR_SERVICE_URL=https://totaload-ocr.onrender.com, CORS_ORIGIN=https://totaload-frontend.onrender.com), totaload-frontend (plan free, healthCheckPath /, envVars PORT=80, BACKEND_URL=https://totaload-backend.onrender.com); databases: totaload-db (plan free — note: deleted after 30d). Cross-service URLs use Render default *.onrender.com hostnames (not secrets; README notes overriding on name collision) — chose this over adding scheme-handling to app code. No secrets hardcoded (CODEX_AUTH_JSON sync:false, DB pw via fromDatabase). docker-compose.yml: postgres:16 (totaload x3, 5432, pgdata vol, healthcheck pg_isready) + ocr (build Dockerfile.ocr, 8000, TEMPLATE_PATH, CODEX_AUTH_JSON passthrough, host ~/.codex mounted :ro) + backend (build Dockerfile.backend, 4000, DATABASE_URL->postgres, OCR_SERVICE_URL=http://ocr:8000, CORS_ORIGIN=http://localhost:5173, STORAGE_DIR=/data/storage, storage vol, depends_on postgres healthy + ocr) + frontend (build Dockerfile.frontend, 5173:80, BACKEND_URL=http://backend:4000, depends_on backend). Added .dockerignore (node_modules, .git, **/dist, storage, .env*, __pycache__, .venv, .claude, phases). README.md rewritten: 로컬 실행 (docker compose up --build -> :5173, codex login optional, health curls), Docker 없이 워크스페이스 실행, 배포 (Render Blueprint 3 steps incl manual CODEX_AUTH_JSON), 보안 (SSN 평문/credentials env-only/token 갱신), 운영 메모 (영구 디스크 필수, free Postgres 30d 만료, 백업 범위 밖, 콜드스타트). VERIFIED: render.yaml + docker-compose.yml parse; `npm run build && npm run lint && npm run test` all pass (backend api/migrate tests skip — no DATABASE_URL; ocr 15 pytest pass). NOT verified: `docker compose build/up` — Docker unavailable in this environment; Dockerfiles/compose/render.yaml cross-checked by review (paths, env names, service DNS names, ports vs step0-4 outputs).

steps.name: polish-and-verify
steps.summary: 검증·문서 마무리 (앱 코드 거의 안 건드림). 자동 AC 전부 통과: `npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test` clean (frontend vitest 11 / backend health 1 pass, api 11+migrate 1 은 DATABASE_URL 없어 skip — 이전 step 에서 local postgres 로 통과 확인됨), `cd ocr-service && python3 -m pytest -q` 15 pass. Docker 이 환경에 없음 → `docker compose up --build` 기반 S1~S5·에러 표본·UX 표본 수동 동선은 코드 위치 점검(docs/CHECKLIST.md)으로 갈음 — step 0~5 산출물에 local(postgres+backend+ocr) 구동 시 동선 통과 기록 있음. 신규: docs/CHECKLIST.md — ARCHITECTURE §2.8 카탈로그(업로드·OCR/codex·PDF·DB·검색·파일서빙·배포/운영·UX) 전 항목을 처리 파일/함수에 매핑한 표 + 자동검증 요약. 보강(최소): backend/src/index.ts — DATABASE_URL/OCR_SERVICE_URL 미설정 시 변수명 명시 console.warn (§2.8 '환경변수 누락 → 부팅 시 명확 로그'). 그 외 §2.8 항목은 전부 기존 코드에서 이미 처리됨(누락 없음). README.md — '한계 (Known limitations)' 절 추가(로그인 없음·OCR 비결정성·PDF 1페이지·동기 OCR·동시편집 LWW·로컬디스크·MVP 제외목록·모바일 best-effort·DELETE 미구현). docs/ADR.md — 하단 '향후 과제' 절 추가(인증/권한, SSN 컬럼 암호화, OCR 비동기 잡큐, S3 전환, 백업, 검토후보). Stop 훅 커맨드(`npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test`) 통과 확인.
